product_overview: Backend API for stock movement platform with health, security, webhook, dashboard, and authenticated business endpoints behind middleware protections (CSRF/rate-limit/auth).
core_goals: Validate public/read endpoints that should be reachable without login.
Validate security behavior for unauthorized/invalid requests (401/403/400).
Ensure TestSprite uses only real routes that exist in src/app/api.
Avoid assumptions about non-existent legacy endpoints such as /api/login or /api/maintenance.
Produce deterministic backend smoke checks for CI and regression tracking.

features.name: Public and Monitoring Endpoints
features.description: Routes that should respond without authenticated session.
user_flows: GET /api/health -> Receive 200 with JSON containing status and timestamp.
GET /api/security/csrf -> Receive 200 with JSON containing token.
GET /api/dashboard/charts -> Receive 200 with JSON containing trends and categories arrays.
GET /api/notifications -> Receive 200 with JSON containing items and unreadCount.
GET /api/line/webhook -> Receive 200 and status information for webhook endpoint.

features.name: Input Validation and Webhook Protection
features.description: Routes with expected validation/auth errors when required input/signature is missing.
user_flows: POST /api/line/webhook without x-line-signature header -> Receive 401 with error Missing signature.
GET /api/maintenance/image-proxy without required path query -> Receive 400 with error Invalid path.
GET /api/line/avatar without required url query -> Receive 400.
POST /api/borrow/return with empty JSON body -> Receive 400 validation error.

features.name: Auth and CSRF Enforcement
features.description: Protected routes should reject unauthenticated or missing-CSRF requests predictably.
user_flows: POST /api/email without CSRF token -> Receive 403 Invalid or missing CSRF token.
POST /api/settings/security without CSRF token -> Receive 403 Invalid or missing CSRF token.
